name: Arlington Park
description: Arlington Park is a place to play pickleball in Shawano, WI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Kuckuk park
description: Kuckuk park is a place to play pickleball in Shawano, WI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
